subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of God! You should be unspeakably grateful to Mrs. Knobloch, Mrs. Doring, and Mrs. Rose Schwarz, as these blessed souls were the cause of your enlightenment
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance, @unity; oneness of humanity
